extraction.one_line_summary: PIDCOCK attacked from the break on the final climb, soloed to victory by nearly a minute over JORGENSON and VERMAERKE in Belleville-en-Beaujolais.
tactical_patterns: PIDCOCK's solo attack from breakaway on final climb demonstrates UAE's willingness to surrender stage control despite yellow jersey.
ABRAHAMSEN chose survival mode over contesting climbs when reshuffling occurred, prioritizing weekend mountain points over today's category climbs.
JORGENSON's late attacking from chase group nearly caught break, revealing EF form building despite ultimately playing waiting game in sprint.
UAE team cars mismanaged crash support for DE LA CRUZ, prioritizing positioning over immediate rider assistance on narrow roads.

rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: positive: Second Tour stage win in 2023, superior descending and climbing combination overwhelmed break on final ascent.
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: positive: Best career Tour finish (third), aggressive chasing nearly bridged minute gap despite heavy attacking workload.
rider_signals.ABRAHAMSEN Jonas: neutral: Polka dot lead reduced from 18 to 16 points after choosing not to contest early climbs, banking on weekend mountains.
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Seventh consecutive day in yellow with 17-second gap unchanged, stayed glued to POGAČAR throughout chaotic early racing.
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: Sprinted against VINGEGAARD at finish despite no GC opportunity, signaling form and psychological gamesmanship before Stage 13.
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: negative: Hard crash on narrow chip-seal roads with inadequate team car support response.
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: neutral: Active in early breakaway attempts alongside CICCONE and NEILANDS during opening category three climb attacks.
rider_signals.VERMAERKE Kevin: positive: Strong fourth place after extended chase effort, best Tour result for American development rider.
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: neutral: Survived hilly stage in lead group despite sprinter profile, highlighting Tour form depth.
